prose.title: 68w mos
prose.body: The 68W MOS (or Military Occupational Specialty) is the designation for a role in the U.S. Army known as a Combat Medic Specialist. Individuals with this MOS are responsible for providing medical treatment and care to injured soldiers on the battlefield or in other military operations. They have skills in emergency medical treatment, trauma management, and other aspects necessary to provide immediate care to those in need.
